title: 120-Iteration Deep Review Findings
description: Remediation specification for 243 deduplicated findings synthesized from the merged 120-iteration deep review across packets 009, 010, 012, and 014. The packet is organized around 11 workstreams, with the governed save-time reconsolidation scope leak treated as the release-blocking P0, followed by sequential hardening workstreams and then batch-automatable correctness, security, and test-quality remediations once the scope-boundary foundations are in place.
